sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click blue shape on right panel
# Blue shape is at rows 34-38, cols 42-54
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 48}])
print(f"After clicking blue shape: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check current objects
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nLeft panel objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] not in ('c', 'B', 'G', 'W', 'g') and n['pixels'] > 1:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if max(cols) < 30:
            print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Check right panel
print("\nRight panel objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('R', 'b') and n['pixels'] > 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if min(cols) >= 35:
            print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Check left panel ascii
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nLeft panel rows 20-45:")
for r in range(20, 45):
    row_str = ascii_lines[r][5:25]
    if row_str.strip():
        print(f"  Row {r}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
